reviews.comment:
No había sandwiches ni medialunas , y eran las 12. Después de ahí ya no hay donde parar. Tampoco jabón en el baño. No es una crítica, se que es nuevo. Para ir mejorando

(Translated by Google)
There were no sandwiches or croissants, and it was noon. After that, there's nowhere to stop. There was no soap in the bathroom either. This isn't a complaint; I know it's new. They'll keep improving.
